TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Peter Mutharika == ryax sa tay nqu tay, Peter Mutharika, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1940) mrhuw Malawi ta' misuw hya' ga Peter Mutharika, aring ryax tay 31 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan Peter Mutharika sa kawas 2012, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == peter mutńßarika == rjax s~…ēa taj nqu taj, peter mutńßarika, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw malawi ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a peter mutńßarika, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qnxan peter mutńßarika s~…ēa kawas~…ē ****, t ĒariŇč mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~…ēezi. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: == Peter Mutharika == ryax sa tay nqu tay, Peter Mutharika, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1940) mrhuw Malawi ta' misuw hya' ga Peter Mutharika, aring ryax tay 31 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan Peter Mutharika sa kawas 2012, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

(minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw malawi ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a peter mutńßarika, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qnxan peter mutńßarika s~…ēa kawas~…ē ****, t ĒariŇč mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~…ēezi. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
